query:
-- Total revenue now
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) as services_with_revenue,
  SUM(s.monthlyRevenue) as total_revenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination');

-- New assignments created (total was 2718 after backfill, now 3198)
SELECT 3198 - 2718 as new_assignments_from_automatch;

-- Check if monthlyRevenue needs to be recalculated from new assignments
SELECT COUNT(*) as unmatched_services_remaining
FROM services s
WHERE s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination')
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.externalId NOT IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
  AND s.externalId NOT IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM unbillable_services);

  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) as services_with_revenue,
  SUM(s.monthlyRevenue) as total_revenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination');

-- New assignments created (total was 2718 after backfill, now 3198)
SELECT 3198 - 2718 as new_assignments_from_automatch;

-- Check if monthlyRevenue needs to be recalculated from new assignments
SELECT COUNT(*) as unmatched_services_remaining
FROM services s
